mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, image_url AS imageUrl, recognition_result AS recognitionResult, recognition_model AS recognitionModel, recognition_time AS recognitionTime, status, error_msg AS errorMsg FROM image_recognition WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, image_url AS imageUrl, recognition_result AS recognitionResult, recognition_model AS recognitionModel, recognition_time AS recognitionTime, status, error_msg AS errorMsg FROM image_recognition WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY recognition_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
